svg.aria-label: Interactive diagram of RoPE and NoPE mechanics. RoPE: three frequency pairs rotate the key vector by an angle proportional to token offset, so the query-key match dephases as the offset grows, and offsets beyond the training length produce angles unseen in training. NoPE: no rotation, match unchanged at any offset. Drag along the token ruler to change the offset.
svg.text: key token's distance from the query (tokens)
offset m − n = 6 tokens — RoPE match 56% · NoPE match 100%
